section_title: LVS symmetric-matcher residual (KLayout `Netlists don't match`, layout actually correct)

prose_excerpt:
**Symptoms:**
- DRC report shows METAL*_ANTENNA violations (e.g., METAL4_ANTENNA, METAL5_ANTENNA)
- All violations are antenna-rule related; no spacing/width violations
- Violation counts vary across configs of the same design (layout-dependent)

**Root Cause:**
Long unbroken metal routes accumulate charge during plasma etching, which can damage thin gate oxides. Normally OpenROAD's `repair_antenn
